ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., quarterback, running back) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conference the player's team belongs to */,
  "division_id" INTEGER /* ID of the division the player's team belongs to */,
  "player_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "hometown" TEXT /* Hometown of the player */,
  "college" TEXT /* College the player attended */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round in which the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the player is currently active */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL to the player's photo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_division_id FOREIGN KEY ("division_id") REFERENCES divisions ("division_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_conference_id FOREIGN KEY ("conference_id") REFERENCES conferences ("conference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conference the team belongs to */,
  "division_id" INTEGER /* ID of the division the team belongs to */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's coach */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the team plays */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the stadium */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conferences" (
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conference */,
  "conference_name" TEXT /* Name of the conference */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the conference was founded */,
  "commissioner_name" TEXT /* Name of the conference commissioner */,
  "conference_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the conference's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "divisions" (
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each division */,
  "division_name" TEXT /* Name of the division */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the division was founded */,
  "division_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the division's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "team1_id" INTEGER /* ID of team 1 */,
  "team2_id" INTEGER /* ID of team 2 */,
  "score1" INTEGER /* Score of team 1 */,
  "score2" INTEGER /* Score of team 2 */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the game was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of attendees at the game */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  "overtime" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the game went into overtime */,
  "game_summary" TEXT /* A brief summary of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team2_id FOREIGN KEY ("team2_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team1_id FOREIGN KEY ("team1_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passing_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passing statistic */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "completions" INTEGER /* Number of completed passes */,
  "attempts" INTEGER /* Number of attempted passes */,
  "yards" INTEGER /* Total yards gained */,
  "touchdowns" INTEGER /* Number of touchdowns scored */,
  "interceptions" INTEGER /* Number of interceptions thrown */,
  "qbr" REAL /* Quarterback rating */,
  "yards_per_attempt" REAL /* Average yards gained per pass attempt */,
  "longest_pass" INTEGER /* Longest pass thrown */,
  "sacks" INTEGER /* Number of times the quarterback was sacked */,
  "sack_yards" INTEGER /* Total yards lost due to sacks */,
  "touchdown_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of touchdown passes */,
  "interception_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of interceptions thrown */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passing_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passing_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rushing_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rushing statistic */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "attempts" INTEGER /* Number of rushing attempts */,
  "yards" INTEGER /* Total yards gained */,
  "average" REAL /* Average yards per carry */,
  "longest" INTEGER /* Longest rush */,
  "touchdowns" INTEGER /* Number of touchdowns scored */,
  "rushes_per_game" REAL /* Average number of rushing attempts per game */,
  "touchdown_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of rushing attempts that result in touchdowns */,
  "fumbles" INTEGER /* Number of fumbles */,
  "fumbles_lost" INTEGER /* Number of fumbles lost */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rushing_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rushing_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "receiving_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each receiving statistic */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "receptions" INTEGER /* Number of receptions */,
  "yards" INTEGER /* Total yards gained */,
  "average" REAL /* Average yards per reception */,
  "longest" INTEGER /* Longest reception */,
  "touchdowns" INTEGER /* Number of touchdowns scored */,
  "receptions_per_game" REAL /* Average number of receptions per game */,
  "touchdown_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of receptions that result in touchdowns */,
  "dropped_passes" INTEGER /* Number of dropped passes */,
  "fumbles" INTEGER /* Number of fumbles */,
  "fumbles_lost" INTEGER /* Number of fumbles lost */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_receiving_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_receiving_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., coach, analyst, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "can_edit_data" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user can edit data */,
  "can_delete_data" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user can delete data */,
  "can_view_private_data" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user can view private data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "response_time" REAL /* Response time for the access request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)
